name: dev.onevr.vrworldtoolkit.zhcn
description:
VRWorld Toolkit 是一款 Unity Editor 扩展，旨在降低 VRChat 世界创作门槛，让创建高性能世界更加容易。本分支为社区中文汉化版。

VRWorld Toolkit is a Unity Editor extension made to make VRChat world creation more accessible and lower the entry-level to make a good performing world. This fork is a community Chinese localization.
